# deliberate mismatch (test-only): trade count corrupted (should be 1) -> must be detected.
version 1
meta seed 0 symbols 1 orders 3 max_qty 1000 max_notional 1000000
cmd reg S0
cmd limit 0 1 S 105 5 GTC
cmd limit 0 2 B 100 5 GTC
cmd limit 0 3 S 100 2 GTC
snapshot last_seq 4 trades 2
sym 0 bid 100 ask 105 orders 2
level 0 B 100 3
level 0 A 105 5
